name: Shenzhen Sinexcel Electric Co.,Ltd.
summary: Shenzhen Sinexcel Electric Co.,Ltd. provides smart electric power solutions in China, rest of Asia, Australia, Europe, and North America. The company offers power quality products, such as active voltage conditioners, active harmonic filters, static var generators, ASVG products, SPC solutions, theta APF systems, Scada systems, and management systems, as well as SVG compensation technology. It also provides EV chargers modules for electric buses and vehicles, AC EV chargers, and DC fast chargers; hybrid and customized energy storage solutions; container type and centralized PV inverters; and lithium and lead acid battery packs. Shenzhen Sinexcel Electric Co.,Ltd. is based in Shenzhen, China.
